items.name: CODE_ONLY_FAST
items.description: Default for small code-only changes, documentation changes and fast bugfixes.

items.name: FAST_VALIDATION
items.description: Standard validation without browser, screenshots, console inspection or manual visual QA unless explicitly requested.

items.name: BROWSER_SMOKE
items.description: Narrow browser/runtime check only by explicit Human Owner request or task acceptance criteria.

items.name: VISUAL_QA
items.description: Screenshots and visual inspection only by explicit Human Owner request or acceptance criteria.
